SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.kotlin

Class JkKotlinCompiler

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.kotlin.JkKotlinCompiler
public final class JkKotlinCompiler extends Object
Represents a Kotlin compiler.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    JkKotlinCompiler.Target
    Represents the possible target platforms for the Kotlin compiler.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JkKotlinCompiler
    addJvmOption(String option)
    Adds JVM options to pass to compiler program (which is a Java program).
    JkKotlinCompiler
    addOption(String option)
    Adds an option to the Kotlin compiler.
    JkKotlinCompiler
    addPlugin(String coordinate)
    Instructs this compiler to use the plugin identified by the specified coordinates.
    JkKotlinCompiler
    addPlugin(Path pluginJar)
    Adds a plugin JAR file to the Kotlin compiler.
    JkKotlinCompiler
    addPluginOption(String pluginId, String name, String value)
    Adds a plugin option to the Kotlin compiler.
    boolean
    compile(JkKotlinJvmCompileSpec compileSpec)
    Compiles the source files to the output directory.
    List<String>
    getOptions()
     
    List<String>
    getPluginOptions()
    Returns the list of plugin options used by this compiler.
    List<String>
    getPlugins()
    Returns the list of plugins used by this compiler.
    JkRepoSet
    getRepos()
    Retrieves the set of repositories to fetch stdlib and plugins.
    JkPathSequence
    getStdJdk8Lib()
    Returns the path of the standard JDK 8 libraries for the Kotlin compiler.
    Path
    getStdLib()
    Returns path of stdlib located in JEKA_HOME (if the compiler is provided by the platform) of from a repo (if the compiler is managed by JeKa, meaning the version is specified)
    String
    getVersion()
    Returns the version of Kotlin this compiler stands for.
    boolean
    isProvidedCompiler()
    Returns true if this compiler is provided by the host machine, meaning it has not been downloaded and managed by Jeka.

    Creates a JkKotlinCompiler based on the specified command.
    static JkKotlinCompiler
    ofJvm(JkRepoSet repos)
    Creates a JkKotlinCompiler for JVM with the specified by 'jeka.kotlin.version' property and fetched from the specified repository.
    static JkKotlinCompiler

    Creates a JkKotlinCompiler for JVM with the specified version and fetched from the specified repository .
    static JkKotlinCompiler
    ofKotlinHomeCommand(String command)
    Creates a JkKotlinCompiler based on the specified command located in `KOTLIN_HOME` directory.
    static JkKotlinCompiler
    ofTarget(JkRepoSet repos, JkKotlinCompiler.Target target, String kotlinVersion)
    Creates a JkKotlinCompiler of the specified Kotlin version for the specified target platform.

    Sets the flag to indicate whether compilation should fail on error or not.

    Sets the flag to indicate whether the compiler output should be logged or not.

  • Method Details

    • ofCommand

      public static JkKotlinCompiler ofCommand(String command)
      Creates a JkKotlinCompiler based on the specified command. The specified command is supposed to be accessible from the working directory. Examples of command are "kotlinc", "kotlinc-native", "/my/kotlin/home/kotlin-js", ...

    • ofKotlinHomeCommand

      public static JkKotlinCompiler ofKotlinHomeCommand(String command)
      Creates a JkKotlinCompiler based on the specified command located in `KOTLIN_HOME` directory. Examples of command are "kotlinc", "kotlin-jvm", "kotlin-js".

    • ofTarget

      public static JkKotlinCompiler ofTarget(JkRepoSet repos, JkKotlinCompiler.Target target, String kotlinVersion)
      Creates a JkKotlinCompiler of the specified Kotlin version for the specified target platform. The compiler matching the specified Kotlin version is downloaded from the specified repo.

    • ofJvm

      public static JkKotlinCompiler ofJvm(JkRepoSet repos, String version)
      Creates a JkKotlinCompiler for JVM with the specified version and fetched from the specified repository .
      Parameters:
      repos - The repository set to download the Kotlin compiler from.
      version - The version of Kotlin to use.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if `version` is null.

    • ofJvm

      public static JkKotlinCompiler ofJvm(JkRepoSet repos)
      Creates a JkKotlinCompiler for JVM with the specified by 'jeka.kotlin.version' property and fetched from the specified repository.
      Parameters:
      repos - The repository set to download the Kotlin compiler from.

    • isProvidedCompiler

      public boolean isProvidedCompiler()
      Returns true if this compiler is provided by the host machine, meaning it has not been downloaded and managed by Jeka.

    • getVersion

      public String getVersion()
      Returns the version of Kotlin this compiler stands for. If this compiler is coming the hosting machine, this method returns null.

    • getStdLib

      public Path getStdLib()
      Returns path of stdlib located in JEKA_HOME (if the compiler is provided by the platform) of from a repo (if the compiler is managed by JeKa, meaning the version is specified)

    • getStdJdk8Lib

      public JkPathSequence getStdJdk8Lib()
      Returns the path of the standard JDK 8 libraries for the Kotlin compiler.

    • setFailOnError

      public JkKotlinCompiler setFailOnError(boolean fail)
      Sets the flag to indicate whether compilation should fail on error or not.

    • setLogCommand

      public JkKotlinCompiler setLogCommand(boolean log)
      Sets the flag to indicate whether the compiler command should be logged or not.

    • setLogOutput

      public JkKotlinCompiler setLogOutput(boolean log)
      Sets the flag to indicate whether the compiler output should be logged or not.

    • getRepos

      public JkRepoSet getRepos()
      Retrieves the set of repositories to fetch stdlib and plugins.

    • setRepos

      public JkKotlinCompiler setRepos(JkRepoSet repos)
      Set the repo to fetch stdlib and plugins.

    • addJvmOption

      public JkKotlinCompiler addJvmOption(String option)
      Adds JVM options to pass to compiler program (which is a Java program).

    • addPluginOption

      public JkKotlinCompiler addPluginOption(String pluginId, String name, String value)
      Adds a plugin option to the Kotlin compiler.

    • addPlugin

      public JkKotlinCompiler addPlugin(Path pluginJar)
      Adds a plugin JAR file to the Kotlin compiler.

    • addPlugin

      public JkKotlinCompiler addPlugin(String coordinate)
      Instructs this compiler to use the plugin identified by the specified coordinates. If the coordinate does not mention the version, the Kotlin version of this compiler is chosen.

      JkKotlinCompiler.Plugin class provides constants about most common plugin coordinates.

    • addOption

      public JkKotlinCompiler addOption(String option)
      Adds an option to the Kotlin compiler.

    • compile

      public boolean compile(JkKotlinJvmCompileSpec compileSpec)
      Compiles the source files to the output directory.
      Returns:
      false if a compilation error occurred.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if a compilation error occurred and the 'withFailOnError' flag is true.

    • getPlugins

      public List<String> getPlugins()
      Returns the list of plugins used by this compiler.

    • getPluginOptions

      public List<String> getPluginOptions()
      Returns the list of plugin options used by this compiler.

    • getOptions

      public List<String> getOptions()
